Lawns & Edging/Gutter Cleaning/Window Washing/Pressure Washing/Fencing/Seasonal Care/ Lawns & Edging/Gutter Cleaning/Window Washing/Pressure Washing/Fencing/Seasonal Care/

Keeping a place looking its best never really stops.

There is always something. The grass, the leaves, the gutters, the grime on the drive. And the help can be worse than the work: crews that rush it, cut corners, and leave you chasing them. You should not have to manage the people you hired to take it off your plate.

So hand it over, to people who actually finish.

We are a local outfit, and we treat your property like our own. One point of contact, one standard, done on schedule. Here is how simple it is.

01

Tell us what it needs

A quick call or text and a free walkthrough. We tell you straight what we would do and what it costs.

02

We take care of it

On schedule and to a standard. Clean edges, nothing left behind, every visit. You stop thinking about it.

03

Enjoy your place

Come home to a property that always looks its best, all season, while you get on with the good stuff.

Owner-led. Locally accountable.

We are Justin and Chase. We started Moose because we could not stand seeing a property done halfway. Every job goes out under our name and our standard, and whoever is on the truck is held to it the same way we hold ourselves. You get a local outfit that answers for the work, not a franchise, not a faceless service.

Recent work.

A gutter cleaning job, start to finish. Guards off, each one hand-wiped, everything put back the way it was.

Why people stop worrying about it once we are on it.

  • We clean up after ourselves. Clippings and debris leave with us, every time.
  • We sweat the details. The edges, the corners, the parts most crews rush.
  • We show up when we say. On schedule, every visit, no chasing.
  • We treat it like ours. Careful around your home, your beds, and your time.

Every season, your place at its best. And you never think about it.

Free quotes, no pressure. Serving Paisley, Walkerton, Hanover, Port Elgin & surrounding.
